name: Audio Reactive Basic
description: Minimal audio-reactive starter mirroring the standalone shape of create_audio_reactive (Layer-1): an audio source feeds both an Audio Spectrum CHOP (for FFT visuals) and an Analyze CHOP (for an overall RMS level). The spectrum is published as a CHOP-to-TOP texture that a downstream visual chain can sample; the RMS level is exposed as a stable Null CHOP ready for bind_to_channel. A Constant TOP is driven by the level via expression bindings on its color channels, so the output frame pulses with the audio out of the box.

nodes.name: audioin
nodes.comment: Live audio input. Replace with audiofileinCHOP if you prefer a file source.

nodes.name: spectrum
nodes.comment: FFT spectrum. outlength clamped into TD's 128–4096 range to keep choptoTOP within GPU limits.

nodes.name: level
nodes.comment: Function 6 = RMS power. One stable amplitude channel for downstream modulation.

nodes.name: level_null
nodes.comment: Stable ref for bind_to_channel ('chan1' = RMS amplitude).

nodes.name: audio_tex
nodes.comment: Spectrum as a 1-row texture. Sample sTD2DInputs[0] in a downstream GLSL TOP.

nodes.name: sensitivity
nodes.comment: Sensitivity gain on the spectrum texture before any visual chain consumes it.

nodes.name: out_color
nodes.comment: Audio-driven color: colorr/g/b are bound via expressions to the RMS level (see `parameters`), so the frame pulses with the audio.

nodes.name: out1
nodes.comment: Final output of the audio-reactive system.

parameters.name: Level → Red
parameters.description: Red channel follows the RMS level (×2 gain, clamped).

parameters.name: Level → Green
parameters.description: Green channel follows the RMS level at reduced gain.

parameters.name: Level → Blue
parameters.description: Blue floor of 0.25 keeps a dim violet frame at silence; level lifts it.

preview_description: A dim violet frame that pulses brighter and warmer with the audio RMS level, with the spectrum texture chain in place for a custom shader downstream.
